raw_consumer_statement:
while on XXXX in XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, On XX/XX/XXXX a merchant ran my credit card ( Citibank Visa through Best Buy ) on their card machine twice to pay for T shirts told me that my card DID NOT WORK and was unable to purchase. after telling my Brother the same thing on his card. finially they accepted my wifes card for the shirts ( XXXX pesos {$40.00} ) As we were leaving the store we ALL recieved alerts on our phones about charges........ 
mine was {$460.00}. and {$520.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX ) My brother also recieved a charge for the SAME AMOUNT {$520.00} from SAME place at the same time, but his card ( XXXX XXXX DECLINED it as FRAUD ) I have a copy of that text....... 
Then my wife got another charge on her card for {$800.00} not pesos. 
we all called our card companies within minutes and reported this and I told mine that it was a bogus charge and NOT to pay them. and they canceled my card and put it under review .................. 
My brother and wife card companies stopped charges and protected THEM, but after reviewing mine CITIBANK put the charges back on my NEW CARD ( {$980.00} ) and said that there was NO FOUL PLAY OR FRAUD.................... 
I have disputed this at least 3 different times and talked to many different agents and I only get passed around like a HOT PATATO ( not it... ) they say I gave them my card, which I did ........... But they told me it DID NOT WORK and did not charge it untill I left the store, How in the world is that not THEFT and FRADUALANT .............

I told them all the details and that I have 3 witness to this and still they said it is not FRADUALNT even after I CALLED WITHIN MINUITES and told them NOT to let that charge go thouh and the STOLE that amount and I recieved NOTHING in return........
